title: Mission Control / Command Center
summary: A single mobile-first view that organizes everything Fritz has in flight. The generator reads the live repo ledgers (plans/registry.json, tasks/tasks.jsonl, runs/runs.jsonl, proofs/proof-ledger.jsonl, agents/catalog.json, platform/registry/capabilities.json, sites) and emits command-center/{index.html, briefing.md, state.json}. Every active plan is scored on stage, momentum, autonomy, and profitability, and the briefing names what needs Fritz, the most profitable next move, and the most autonomous win.
completed_scope: Mobile-first dashboard with KPI tiles, a 'Needs you now' list, a plan-health doughnut, and an autonomy x profit quadrant chart (Chart.js via CDN).
Virtual-Fritz daily briefing (briefing.md) and machine-readable snapshot (state.json).
Heuristic, tunable scoring model documented in the generator SCORING block.
Sibling Shay capabilities scaffolded and registered: billing.* (invoice generation) and work.* (Jira/standup drafting), plus docs/shay-fritz-ready/ROADMAP.md.
assumptions: The dashboard reads ledgers read-only; it never mutates plan/task state.
Scoring is heuristic and tunable; profit ~= revenue-proximity by tag/role, autonomy ~= how much can proceed without Fritz.
known_gaps: Generator is run manually today — no fam-hub command and no cron yet (task 001).
Not yet served by Studio /api/ops or mounted in the Workbench/Shay Desk (task 002).
No automatic delivery of the morning briefing to Fritz's phone yet (task 003).
billing.* and work.* capabilities generate/draft only; send paths are blocked on a payment-provider decision and Jira/Slack creds (tasks 004-005).
